Purpose: Document payroll authorization, preparation, approval, provider/system submission, reconciliation, restricted records, and exception handling.. Current status: Needs Professional Review. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who owns payroll changes and approvals, and what tax, minister-compensation, benefit, and filing practices require professional confirmation?. File name: docs/procedures/contribution-entry-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document physical and online contribution entry, payout matching, corrections, donor updates, confidentiality, designated/memorial gifts, and reporting.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who enters and reviews contributions, and what correction, memorial-gift, and online-payout rules should apply?. File name: docs/procedures/reimbursement-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document reimbursement request, approval, payment, and filing steps.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Bookkeeper, Treasurer. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Which form or software workflow will be used?. File name: docs/procedures/business-meeting-report-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Define preparation, Finance review, confidentiality, presentation, and follow-up for church business-meeting financial reports.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Pastor, Congregation. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What report format, aggregate information, and review deadline does the congregation expect or require?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/software-requirements.md. Type of document: Requirements. Purpose: Define software requirements before selecting ChurchTrac, IconCMO, QuickBooks, or another system.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Which requirements are must-have before demos?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/icon-vs-churchtrac-comparison.md. Type of document: Comparison template. Purpose: Compare IconCMO and ChurchTrac using confirmed vendor information.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which vendor details can be confirmed from official materials or demos?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/demo-scorecard.md. Type of document: Demo scorecard. Purpose: Provide 1-5 scoring tool and demo questions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who attends demos and how should category weights be set?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/implementation-plan.md. Type of document: Implementation plan. Purpose: Outline phases for requirements, selection, setup, migration, training, go-live, and review.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: What timeline, data migration scope, and training plan are realistic?. File name: docs/communications/leadership-review-packet.md. Type of document: Leadership review packet. Purpose: Summarize situation, diagnosis, structure, committee decisions, church approval questions, roadmap, and risks.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which leaders should review before committee action or church communication?. File name: docs/communications/finance-committee-packet.md. Type of document: Committee review packet. Purpose: Provide Finance Committee with situation summary, decision areas, software/reimbursement/spending/card/budget questions, and monthly review rhythm.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Pastor, Deacons. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which decisions should Finance Committee make before Personnel finalizes role and hiring materials?. File name: docs/communications/finance-committee-recommendation.md. Type of document: Communication draft. Purpose: Draft a Finance Committee recommendation format.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: What actual recommendation will Finance make?.
